added_section_headings: The following General Policy Conditions apply to this Policy except where a Section contains its own specific conditions or other provisions dealing with the same subject matter. In respect of Sections 14 and 15, any Section-specific conditions, claims provisions, notice requirements, cooperation obligations, other insurance provisions, change of control provisions, cancellation provisions or similar specialist provisions shall prevail to the extent of any inconsistency.

Insuring clauses applicable to this Management Liability Section

In respect of the following Insuring Clauses, the Insurer shall pay up to up to the Limit of liability stated in the Schedule for each Insuring Clause purchased in respect of any one Single Claim. For the avoidance of doubt, If the Schedule states that an Insuring Clause is “Not Applicable” then there is no coverage in respect of that Insuring Clause.
